response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with strong expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, and high-performance systems (C, C++, D). However, his C++ experience is limited to a short period (6 months at National Instruments) and lacks recent hands-on work with STL, multi-threading, or industrial automation protocols. His focus on web/mobile development (Node.js, Ember.js, React) does not align closely with the C++/on-premises/cloud platform requirements for industrial automation. Security expertise (IEC 62443) is not evident in his resume.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance systems and low-latency applications (DLang, C/C++)
Proven track record in scalable architectures (micro-services, event-driven systems)
Diverse technical expertise and problem-solving skills across multiple domains
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
concerns: Limited recent C++ and STL experience (only 6 months in 2014-2015)
No evidence of IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity practices
Lack of exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) and cloud platforms (Azure)
No clear alignment with the core C++/on-premises industrial automation focus
